mapper.select: SELECT l.log_id, l.opportunity_id, l.from_stage_code, l.from_stage_name, l.to_stage_code, l.to_stage_name, l.action_type, l.operator_id, l.operator_name, l.operate_time, l.remark, o.opportunity_name FROM mk_opportunity_stage_log l LEFT JOIN mk_opportunity o ON l.opportunity_id = o.opportunity_id WHERE l.opportunity_id = #{opportunityId} ORDER BY l.log_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mk_opportunity_stage_log (opportunity_id, from_stage_code, from_stage_name, to_stage_code, to_stage_name, action_type, operator_id, operator_name, operate_time, remark) VALUES (#{opportunityId}, #{fromStageCode}, #{fromStageName}, #{toStageCode}, #{toStageName}, #{actionType}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, sysdate(), #{remark})
